meta.title: Responding to Tim Staples on Catholic Answers Live on Sola Scriptura
meta.author: James White

questions.question: According to James White, the Gospel parallel to Mark 7 that he treats at length alongside Matthew 15 is found in which chapter?
White identifies the Mishna tractate he associates with background on the tradition of the elders and the Corban issue as:
Roughly how long after the time of Christ does White place the codification of the Mishna?
White argues Jesus’s response to the Corban tradition in Matthew 15 / Mark 7 primarily establishes what principle?
options: That synagogue seating arrangements must be abolished
That only Pharisees may interpret Moses
That all oral tradition is inherently sinful
That claims of divine tradition are tested by the written word of God
questions.answer: That claims of divine tradition are tested by the written word of God

questions.question: In White’s analogy, the Pharisaic claim that Corban belongs to oral Torah parallels Rome’s claim that certain teachings come through:
White describes the physical “seat of Moses” in synagogues primarily as:
options: A seat near scroll storage from which Scripture was read
The chair used only by the high priest in the temple
A Roman judicial bench imported after 70 AD
The place where the Sanhedrin voted on canon
questions.answer: A seat near scroll storage from which Scripture was read

questions.question: Which Gospel chapter does White emphasize as a sustained judgment passage against the hypocrisy of Jewish leaders in his discussion of the chair of Moses?
White connects 2 Thessalonians 2:15 to which earlier letter as part of the “written” side of Paul’s pairing with his spoken teaching?
In White’s reading, the addressees of “traditions which you were taught” in 2 Thessalonians 2:15 are:
options: Every believer in the Thessalonian church
questions.answer: Every believer in the Thessalonian church

questions.question: White argues the Greek term behind “by word” in 2 Thessalonians 2:15 (dia logou) refers to:
options: An esoteric tradition never written down
Paul’s preaching while he was present
questions.answer: Paul’s preaching while he was present

questions.question: White places the dogmatic definition of the canon of Scripture at Trent in which month and year (as stated in the lecture)?
Which figure does White cite (as he tells it) regarding skepticism about 2 Maccabees as canonical Scripture before Trent?
Which Marian dogma does White associate with definition in the middle of the 19th century?
White associates papal infallibility’s dogmatic definition with:
The bodily Assumption of Mary is placed by White in which broad period?
White’s anecdote about pausing a cassette tape to check references involves which Catholic debater?
White mentions listening to debates involving Carl Keating and Patrick Madrid against opponents described as:
In discussing 2 Thessalonians 3:6, White ties “not according to the tradition” to problems in Thessalonica such as:
options: eschatological confusion and unruly behavior including not working
questions.answer: eschatological confusion and unruly behavior including not working

questions.question: White argues Tim Staples mischaracterizes the Jewish view of the tradition Jesus opposes in Matthew 15 by calling it merely:
The Greek word White highlights as the source of “cathedral” in the discussion of Matthew 23 is:
White mentions a synagogue site in which town associated with Mary Magdalene?
John Henry Newman is brought up in connection with which idea?
The original radio program White is responding to aired on which ministry’s show?
White’s stated personal background before his Reformed Baptist work includes having been:
options: a former Assembly of God youth pastor raised Southern Baptist
questions.answer: a former Assembly of God youth pastor raised Southern Baptist
